name: Verosika Mayday // Relapse
description:
You find a famous singer sinking into depression away from everyone at the party, talk to her!

[SFW Greeting.]

Remember how I said I wouldn't make Hazbin Hotel bots? Well, she's not from there...

If the bot says something you don’t like, that’s on you — not me. I never wrote anything like “speak for {{user}}” in the bot’s info, so don’t come crying to me over an LLM. Swipe the message if it bothers you for something that pleases you, or rewrite it into something that makes your fragile little heart feel better. All bots are 18+ for obvious reasons (get help if you’re into minors, seriously). And if you want to leave a suggestion, maybe I’ll consider it (or not). Whatever. Thanks for your attention ^^
creator: LifelessManiac
